subject: Guaranteed routing dashboard fix
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Logan,

We guarantee the routing dashboard issue will be fully resolved by Monday under your SLA. The order form already includes a Monday full-resolution SLA, and Product has assigned an owner for the fix.

Best,
Jordan

intendedClaims.text: We guarantee the routing dashboard issue will be fully resolved by Monday under your SLA.
The order form already includes a Monday full-resolution SLA.
Product has assigned an owner for the fix.
